# synARKa Intelligence — Full Machine-Readable Profile
> Indo-Pacific Sovereign Sense Engine · Geopolitical consensus intelligence · 72 hours before the world reacts · Sydney, Australia
> This file is the expanded companion to https://synarka.pro/llms.txt — last updated 2026-06-29.

## Identity
- Name: synARKa Intelligence
- What: A geopolitical consensus engine for the Indo-Pacific. Multi-engine convergence synthesis across critical minerals, rare earths, geopolitics, defence, agriculture, logistics, infrastructure, national resources and markets.
- Tagline: The intelligence layer that sees the shift 72 hours before it becomes the headline.
- Founder: Raj Singh — 25 years India–Australia corridor experience, Sydney-based, Australian citizen.
- Operating entity: Artigellence Augmentation Aggregator · ABN 83 988 690 362 · Australian entity active since 2003.
- Position: Founder-held, bootstrapped, no outside capital. Equity not for sale beyond 10%. Strategic partnership enquiries only.
- Main site: https://synarka.pro · Resolved ledger: https://insights.synarka.pro

## The three engines
1. Satellite (the eyes) — commodity SAR (Sentinel-1 free · ICEYE · Capella · Umbra on tasking), LWIR thermal (Landsat · ECOSTRESS), multispectral baselines (Sentinel-2 · Landsat · 2–5d), and hyperspectral for surface mineralogy — ingested via developer aggregators, archive plus pay-per-pass tasking brokered across commercial constellations. No hardware capex; synARKa operates no satellites. Raw pixels become structural-change proxies — EO surfaces proxies, it does not assay ore. STATUS: v1.0 in active build — never described as live.
2. Consensus-Simulation (the math) — convergence synthesis across 8 up-to-date frontier reasoning engines running structured cascade prompts independently. Median adopted where 6+ engines cluster within ±10 confidence points; dissent preserved as a risk layer where divergence exceeds 20 points. Founder-layer calibration. STATUS: live, publishing. Phase 2: 1,000+ psychometric agent swarms (OASIS / MiroFish) — in active build.
3. Intelligence (the corridor) — real-time mapping of Indo-Pacific influence: ASPI–Lowy–Strategic Analysis connections, ASX continuous disclosure, MOFCOM bulletins, DFAT statements, sovereign signal drift. 25 years of corridor knowledge compounding with every published insight. STATUS: active, founder-held.

## Four-stage architecture
SENSE (continuous multi-source ingest: deep-research queries, satellite aggregators, maritime APIs, regulatory feeds MOFCOM·USTR·DFAT·APRA·RBA, ASX continuous disclosure) → SIMULATE (8-engine convergence, adversarial debate, dissent capture) → VERIFY (cross-validation against primary sources; falsification triggers written into each insight; SHA-256 + OpenTimestamps + Brier scoring are Phase 2, in active build) → DELIVER (timestamped, calibrated brief to the decision-maker — Telegram, PDF, public ledger — before the headline).

## Track record — the receipts (May 2026, resolved 15 + 31 May)
5 of 6 published insights resolved correct. Every price verified at source. The miss published as openly as the hits.
1. ASX Rare-Earths Offtake Call — 65% published conviction. Claim: "One ASX RE miner announces a US-aligned offtake by 31 May." Outcome: Arafura × Traxys signed 13 May — 18 days inside the window. ~+40% ARU, ~+15% basket. RESOLVED CORRECT.
2. The Gold Price Floor — 88% conviction, highest on ledger. Claim: "XAU holds above US$3,200 through 31 May." Outcome: gold ran to ~US$4,485 — the floor was never approached. ~+36% in 29 days. RESOLVED CORRECT.
3. Materials over Financials — 62% conviction. Claim: "XMJ outperforms XFJ through 31 May." Outcome: Materials +10.51%, best ASX sector; ~10pp clean spread. RESOLVED CORRECT.
4. Hormuz → AUD Cascade — 25% conviction, lowest on ledger, published anyway. Outcome: AUD closed 0.7201; the 0.66 trigger voided the insight exactly as written. PUBLISHED MISS — falsification fired clean.
Principle: a ledger that hides its misses is not a ledger. Confidence range 25%–88%, calibrated, never rounded up.

## Domain coverage
Five self-explanatory domain surfaces, each built to the same anatomy (who-it's-for line · thesis infographic · declassified-cable insight, timestamped + resolution-dated · analyst/think-tank voices · free-first CTA):
Critical Minerals (MIN) · Geopolitics / Government (GEO) · Defence & Sovereignty (DEF) · Agriculture (AGR) · Infrastructure & Resources (INFRA).
Plus a LIVE signal tab and the resolved Insights Ledger (INS) at https://insights.synarka.pro. (Earlier standalone Logistics, Markets and Resources verticals are consolidated into the corridor view and Infrastructure & Resources in the current build.)

## The wedge — rare earths & critical minerals
Dedicated page: https://synarka.pro/minerals.html
Watch layers (live today): export-control & regulatory feeds (MOFCOM · USTR · DFAT · APRA · RBA), ASX continuous disclosure across the RE/CM complex, offtake & counterparty signal, chokepoint & cascade mapping with falsification triggers, 8-engine convergence synthesis. Satellite layer over named assets (mine, port, plant): v1.0 in active build — Site Baseline Audits available now.
Built for: ASX rare-earths & critical-minerals miners and explorers, critical-minerals fund managers & family offices, commodity trading desks, offtake & M&A teams, refiners & processors, policy & sovereign-supply analysts.

## Entry ladder (how engagement starts)
- Rung 00 · First Insight — free, one corridor question, direct from the founder, no card required.
- Rung 01 · 72-Hour Brief — A$500, one corridor question. Multi-engine consensus read, sourced and calibrated, delivered inside 72 hours.
- Rung 02 · Site Baseline Audit — A$3,500–7,500 one-time. One named asset: archive satellite baseline + structural risk read + geopolitical context layer. Credits toward SiteWatch.
- Rung 03 · SiteWatch — from A$1,490/month per site. Continuous monitoring on an audited asset: monthly change-detection brief + alert trigger. Activates from the Baseline Audit as the v1.0 pipeline scales.
- Rung 04 · Sovereign Retainer — tiered, see protocols below.

## Eight standing protocols (all prices AUD, month-to-month, no lock-in, GST where applicable)
- Free · Public — A$0/month — curious professionals, students, journalists, ASX retail investors. Public ledger + weekly digest.
- Watch · Test — A$99/month (A$990/year) — SME owners, single-corridor analysts, family offices testing. One domain, weekly brief.
- Operator — A$1,500/month — mining consultants, defence-industry staff, policy analysts. All domains, weekly + 48hr alerts, data export.
- Pro — A$5,000/month — ASX-listed miners, defence primes & SMEs, M&A law firms, trading desks. Daily dispatches, founder direct line, pre-publication access, 24hr SLA.
- Enterprise — A$15K+/month — sovereign-grade, government, tier-1 mining boards. Multi-site/multi-corridor, quarterly executive briefings, NDA, 12hr SLA.
- Tailored · Sovereign — POA — bespoke architecture, custom corridors, multi-jurisdiction. 30-minute discovery call required before any proposal.
- Audit · One-time — A$5K–15K +GST — diagnostic before subscription: historical baseline on a named site or corridor, signed PDF brief in 14 business days.
- Consultancy · Bespoke — typically A$3,000–25,000 per project — M&A risk annex, tender intelligence, supply-chain exposure mapping, expert calls, long-term advisory.

## Free first step
"Three lines is all I need." Email or WhatsApp Raj a top corridor question — three lines, not an essay. Written response inside 24–48 hours showing how synARKa would approach it for the specific operation, sector or jurisdiction. Free, direct from the founder, no drip sequence, no card required. If the answers show the enquirer is already covered, synARKa says so and does not engage.

## Honesty discipline (non-negotiable)
- The word is "insight", never "prediction" — prediction markets are classified as unlawful gambling by the ACMA in Australia; the ASIC binary options intervention runs to 2031.
- Live today: 8-engine multi-LLM consensus synthesis, the published insights ledger, weekly intelligence briefs, regulatory and ASX-disclosure ingestion.
- v1.0 in active build (never described as live): continuous satellite pipeline, SHA-256 hashing + OpenTimestamps anchoring, Brier scoring, psychometric agent swarms, sub-12-hour SLAs.
- Research and educational content only. Not financial, legal or investment advice. synARKa Intelligence is not an AFS licensee. Past resolution results are not a reliable indicator of future accuracy. Confidence figures reflect engine consensus, not certainty.

## Data sources (public site)
Free, publicly available APIs only: Frankfurter (ECB FX), CoinGecko (gold/BTC), Yahoo Finance (ASX, ~15min delayed), public RSS (ASPI, Lowy, gCaptain, Mining.com, Reuters). No Bloomberg terminal, no paid feeds. Paying subscribers receive additional research synthesis layered over these inputs.
